fields.name: api_key
fields.title: API Key
fields.description: Your Freshdesk API key (found in Profile Settings)

custom_description: Connector for the Freshdesk customer support platform API (v2). Provides read access to helpdesk data including tickets, contacts, agents, groups, companies, roles, satisfaction ratings, surveys, time entries, and ticket fields. Freshdesk is a cloud-based customer support solution that enables companies to manage customer conversations across email, phone, chat, and social media.
supported_questions:
- List all open tickets in Freshdesk
- Show me all agents in the support team
- List all groups configured in Freshdesk
- Get the details of ticket #26
- Show me all companies in Freshdesk
- List all roles defined in the helpdesk
- Show me the ticket fields and their options
- List time entries for tickets
- What are the high priority tickets from last week?
- Which tickets have breached their SLA due date?
- Show me tickets assigned to agent {agent_name}
- Find all tickets from company {company_name}
- How many tickets were created this month by status?
- What are the satisfaction ratings for resolved tickets?
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new ticket in Freshdesk
- Update the status of ticket #{ticket_id}
- Delete a contact from Freshdesk
- Assign a ticket to a different agent

parameters.name: updated_since
parameters.description: Return tickets updated since this timestamp (ISO 8601)

first_operation.description: Returns a paginated list of tickets. By default returns tickets created in the past 30 days. Use updated_since to get older tickets.

parameters.name: updated_since
parameters.description: Return tickets updated since this timestamp (ISO 8601)

tickets.description: Returns a paginated list of tickets. By default returns tickets created in the past 30 days. Use updated_since to get older tickets.
Get a single ticket by ID

parameters.name: updated_since
parameters.description: Return contacts updated since this timestamp (ISO 8601)

contacts.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts
Get a single contact by ID

agents.description: Returns a paginated list of agents
Get a single agent by ID

groups.description: Returns a paginated list of groups
Get a single group by ID

companies.description: Returns a paginated list of companies
Get a single company by ID

roles.description: Returns a paginated list of roles
Get a single role by ID

parameters.name: created_since
parameters.description: Return ratings created since this timestamp (ISO 8601)

satisfaction_ratings.description: Returns a paginated list of satisfaction ratings

surveys.description: Returns a paginated list of surveys

time_entries.description: Returns a paginated list of time entries

ticket_fields.description: Returns a list of all ticket fields

fields.name: description_text
fields.description: Plain text content of the ticket

fields.name: requester
fields.description: Requester details including name, email, and contact info

fields.name: responder_id
fields.description: ID of the agent to whom the ticket is assigned

fields.name: group_id
fields.description: ID of the group to which the ticket is assigned

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: ID of the product associated with the ticket

fields.name: email_config_id
fields.description: ID of the email config used for the ticket

fields.name: custom_fields
fields.description: Custom fields associated with the ticket

fields.name: fr_escalated
fields.description: Whether the first response time was breached

fields.name: nr_escalated
fields.description: Whether the next response time was breached

fields.name: spam
fields.description: Whether the ticket is marked as spam

fields.name: stats
fields.description: Ticket statistics including response and resolution times

fields.name: available_since
fields.description: Timestamp since the agent has been available

fields.name: contact
fields.description: Contact details of the agent including name, email, phone, and job title

fields.name: occasional
fields.description: Whether the agent is an occasional agent

fields.name: auto_ticket_assign
fields.description: Auto ticket assignment: 0=Disabled, 1=Round Robin, 2=Skill Based, 3=Load Based

fields.name: business_hour_id
fields.description: ID of the associated business hour

fields.name: active
fields.description: Whether the contact has been verified

fields.name: custom_fields
fields.description: Custom fields associated with the contact

fields.name: domains
fields.description: Email domains associated with the company

fields.name: custom_fields
fields.description: Custom fields associated with the company

fields.name: default
fields.description: Whether this is a default role

fields.name: billable
fields.description: Whether the time entry is billable

fields.name: label_for_customers
fields.description: Display label in the customer portal

fields.name: position
fields.description: Position of the field in the form

fields.name: default
fields.description: Whether this is a default (non-custom) field

fields.name: required_for_closure
fields.description: Whether the field is required for ticket closure

fields.name: required_for_agents
fields.description: Whether the field is required for agents

fields.name: required_for_customers
fields.description: Whether the field is required for customers

fields.name: customers_can_edit
fields.description: Whether customers can edit this field

fields.name: displayed_to_customers
fields.description: Whether the field is displayed to customers

fields.name: portal_cc
fields.description: Whether CC is enabled in the portal
